# Docs Meta

Generate project documentation and documentation metadata.

## kiri docs

Generated project documentation.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri docs [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri docs generate`](#kiri-docs-generate) - Emit docs/data-model.md, docs/lineage.md,...

### kiri docs generate

Emit docs/data-model.md, docs/lineage.md,...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri docs generate [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
